articles.title: ROAS Isn't Profit: Why Japanese SMB EC Needs Gross-Margin-Aware ROAS
articles.description: ROAS at 300% can still be a loss once gross margin enters the picture. The real bar for EC operators is breakeven ROAS = 1 / gross margin x 100%, paired with RPS for ad budget allocation.
